creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
So this was not merged to 8.3 as it broke many other HT systems.  However, I 
now have what I believe is a fix for this.  Would you be able to test a 9.0 
kernel with the patch below applied and verify that bge still works fine with 
MSI enabled?

http://www.FreeBSD.org/~jhb/patches/hostb_htmsi.patch

-- 
John Baldwin
